title: Image To Image Desert Snapshot To Luxury Studio
sourceTitle: Image To Image Desert Snapshot To Luxury Studio Fashion Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image luxury fashion editorial transformation using REFERENCE_0 casual outdoor snapshot before luxury studio fashion transformation, preserving same person from REFERENCE_0 with exact face and hair identity. Subject: same person from REFERENCE_0 with exact face and hair identity keeps exact face and hair identity from REFERENCE_0 while changing into modest powder-blue tailored cocktail dress with cap sleeves, silver floral embroidery, structured waist, knee-length hem, silver chain-strap clutch, and pointed silver and adopting elegant standing fashion stance with one hand raised near the face and the clutch held naturally at the side. Scene: seamless light-gray studio backdrop with polished high-end editorial styling replaces the casual outdoor snapshot with a clean high-end fashion editorial studio environment. Composition: Fixed full-body editorial portrait with elegant standing fashion stance, one hand raised near the face, clutch in right hand, clear shoe visibility, and polished magazine styling. Signature Elements: Preserved image to image desert snapshot to luxury studio fashion portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Luxury studio fashion editorial, soft cinematic lighting, crisp 8K fashion-photography detail, polished high-end styling, realistic skin and fabric, and refined campaign finish. Color Palette: Fixed seamless light-gray studio neutrality with powder blue dress, silver embroidery, silver clutch and stilettos, soft skin tones, and restrained cool highlights. Lighting: Soft cinematic luxury lighting with clean face readability, gentle fabric highlights, silver accessory glints, and polished editorial shadows. Restrictions: Keep the same adult person, stable face and hair identity, modest refined wardrobe, natural anatomy, clean hands, visible clutch and heels, soft luxury lighting, and polished full-body editorial pose.

使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
